summary: 現有 run_sanguo_governance_regression_harness.py 擴充點盤點結果

gapAssertions.description: 若沒有新增獨立 history sourceFamily，historicalTrustScore 不得因自動採證上升超過 2.0
gapAssertions.failureMessage: anchor isolation violation: generalId={generalId} history delta={delta} > 2.0

gapAssertions.description: 女性優先採證與 worldbuilding boost 不得進 historicalTrustScore
gapAssertions.failureMessage: female boost isolation violation: generalId={generalId} female boost leaked to historical score

gapAssertions.description: auto-applied alias 必須 sandboxStatus=pass，且不得命中 noise labels
gapAssertions.failureMessage: alias safety violation: alias={alias} sandboxStatus={status} noise_hit={noise}

gapAssertions.description: 單一網站或單一 sourceFamily 不得把 wiki/百科/玩家整理升成 A-history
gapAssertions.failureMessage: single-site no-A violation: generalId={generalId} A-history from single sourceFamily={family}
